name: lidocaine

SCN5A_Nav1_5_INa_INaL.note: INa block is the primary mechanism; use-dependent block characteristic of Class IB. Stub literature value pending verification.

stub_provenance_note: SMILES and InChIKey are literature values for lidocaine (PubChem CID 3676); ic50 values are stub estimates pending real assay lookup. Mechanism escalation requires Runpod-real simulation.
